mapper.select: SELECT * FROM broker_fee_config WHERE account_id = #{accountId} AND is_active = 1 ORDER BY fee_rule_type
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO broker_fee_config ( account_id, fee_rule_type, buy_fee_rate, sell_fee_rate, buy_min_fee, sell_min_fee, subscription_discount_rate, is_active, note, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{accountId}, #{feeRuleType}, #{buyFeeRate}, #{sellFeeRate}, #{buyMinFee}, #{sellMinFee}, #{subscriptionDiscountRate}, #{isActive}, #{note}, NOW(), NOW() )
